# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          make build

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build
          path: .

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build
          path: .

      - name: Deploy application
        run: |
          make deploy

  security:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Scan for vulnerabilities
        uses: actions/security-scan@v1
        with:
          target: '.'

  prevent_cicd_security:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Scan for vulnerabilities
        uses: actions/security-scan@v1
        with:
          target: '.'

  team_members:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build
          path: .

      - name: Provide access to team members
        run: |
          make provide_access_to_team_members

  delete_build_artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Delete build artifacts
        run: |
          make delete_build_artifacts
